{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of Last Oath
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Path]] of the Last Oath is a specialized discipline originally developed by and for [[Soulsmiths]]. It focuses on the immediate creation of basic constructs that function as disposable puppets. Beyond mere force, this [[Path]] incorporates various aspects, most notably water. Historically, the discipline is associated with the [[Rune Queen]] [[Emala]], who utilized it to create the [[Grand Oath Array]]. This array was used to seal a black [[dragon]] emperor and his family, effectively locking certain locations in time. The [[Path]] has also produced various offshoots, such as the [[Path of the Dawn Oath]]. While it is a potent method for winning duels and combat, it is characterized by its ruthless nature.}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path]] of the Last Oath was designed for and by [[Soulsmiths]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Last Oath [[Path]] is purely defensive.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Path]] of the Last Oath is a path that contains [[Sages]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Path]] of the Last Oath was founded by an individual whose rivalry with the children of [[Empress]] [[Natarianath]] was recorded.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Path]] of the Last Oath is formed of several aspects including force and water.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
